a.label: Channel vector (static (u_i,gamma_i), rotating (gamma_i,delta_i), augmented (u_i
a.standard_term: tuple of local Kummer radicands attached to a sheet, generating a C_2^s wr S_5 normal closure

b.label: Conjugate embedding labels u_i, gamma_i, beta_i, delta_i
b.standard_term: Galois conjugates under the embeddings of a degree-n field into its Galois closure

evidence.label: Distinctness of conjugate radicands gamma_i (2.3)
evidence.summary:
The entropy-sum primitive-element theorem `K=F(gamma)` implies that

gamma_i != gamma_j for i!=j.                 (2.3)

evidence.label: Independence of fifteen conjugate square classes
evidence.summary:
By the valuation-separation theorem, the fifteen classes

[u_i], [gamma_i], [delta_i],  i=1,...,5

are independent in `E_J^*/E_J^{*2}`.

evidence.label: Independence of ten conjugate square classes
evidence.summary:
Thus the ten classes

[gamma_i], [delta_i],  i=1,...,5

are independent
